title: BarStress
description: BarStress: Resulting stresses in local coordinates along the bar.

Axial.description: Axial stress induced by an axial force along the Bar axis. Positive for tension, negative for compression. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

ShearY.description: Shear stress along the local y-axis. Generally minor axis shear stress. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

ShearZ.description: Shear stress along the local z-axis. Generally major axis shear stress. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

BendingY_Top.description: Stress induced by bending about the local y-axis at the 'uppermost' extreme fiber. Generally the major axis bending stresses in one of the extreme fibers. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

BendingY_Bot.description: Stress induced by bending about the local y-axis at the 'lowermost' extreme fiber. Generally the major axis bending stresses in one of the extreme fibers. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

BendingZ_Top.description: Stress induced by bending about the local z-axis at the 'uppermost' extreme fiber. Generally the minor axis bending stresses in one of the extreme fibers. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

BendingZ_Bot.description: Stress induced by bending about the local z-axis at the 'lowermost' extreme fiber. Generally the minor axis bending stresses in one of the extreme fibers. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

CombAxialBendingPos.description: Worst case tensile normal stress from combined axial and bending in two directions. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

CombAxialBendingNeg.description: Worst case compressive normal stress from combined axial and bending in two directions. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

Position.description: Position on the bar as normalised length, i.e. 0 for start, 1 for end and 0.5 for middle.

Divisions.description: How many division points along the bar was used when extracting this result. This generally means that this many results with the same ObjectId, ResultCase and TimeStep was extracted.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
